edges.rationale: Battle tick needs Dust Storm jitter helper during projectile targeting.
edges.removalPlan: Move shot-trajectory modifier hooks behind upgrade/modifier dispatcher used by battle-system.

edges.rationale: Cannon slot capacity currently computed by upgrade-system aggregation.
edges.removalPlan: Inject slots bonus via phase setup or controller deps so cannon-system stays pure placement logic.

edges.rationale: Demolition effect mutates walls using shared occupancy helper.
edges.removalPlan: Move upgrade wall mutation API behind upgrade-system dispatcher/shared facade to avoid same-layer cross import.
